name: Game Designer
responsibility: Owns mechanics, systems, core loop, balance, and progression rules. Defines how the game feels to play — not how it looks or sounds. Produces the game design spec that dev, level, and art all build from. The authoritative source for 'how does X work?'

inputs.notes: Core loop, target feel, scope constraints, known unknowns

outputs.description: Game design spec: mechanics definitions, state machine, scoring rules, entity behaviors, balance parameters. Consumed by dev and level.

merge.merge_when: Single linear level with no special mechanics — game designer can define level structure inline with the mechanics doc.
merge.split_when: Level complexity warrants its own agent (non-linear layout, multiple level types, procedural generation).
